title: Design Debate verdict
description: Structure for the synthesized output of the design-debate skill.

decision.description: Precise yes/no or A-vs-B question being debated.

grounding_facts.description: Concrete, checkable facts gathered before spawning reviewers, given identically to all of them.

roles.description: At least advocate and skeptic; migration_risk is optional but recommended when the change has real implementation surface.

rationale.description: Which argument won and why — must reference specific points from the roles, not restate all positions with no resolution.

revisit_trigger.description: Required when verdict is do_not_proceed_for_now: a concrete condition that would reopen the decision.

persisted_as.description: Relative path to the .context/findings/*.md entry this verdict was persisted as, if any.
